requirements.description: The ShopEase platform must be live within 6 months maximum from project start. This is a hard deadline set by the client CEO.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform is fully deployed and accessible to end users within 6 months of project kickoff

requirements.description: Sunita Agarwal is the Client CEO and primary business decision-maker. She defines high-level platform vision, compliance requirements, and customer experience priorities.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Rajesh Mehta is the Client PM responsible for operational and technical requirements. He owns decisions on payments, integrations, inventory, and reporting.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Arjun Shah is the Business Analyst on the delivery team responsible for eliciting and documenting requirements. He facilitates the discovery process.
requirements.speaker: Arjun Shah

requirements.description: Priya Nair is the Project Manager on the delivery team responsible for scoping integrations and managing delivery. She identifies technical integration dependencies.
requirements.speaker: Priya Nair

requirements.description: RetailCorp India operates approximately 200 physical stores across India and is entering the online retail space for the first time. No existing e-commerce platform is in place.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: The average order value on the platform is expected to be approximately INR 15,000, reflecting high-ticket product categories such as appliances, electronics, and furniture.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: The system must support payment via credit card, debit card, UPI, and net banking. All four methods must be available at checkout.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can complete a purchase using credit card
Customer can complete a purchase using debit card
Customer can complete a purchase using UPI
Customer can complete a purchase using net banking

requirements.description: The system must support credit card EMI as a payment option at checkout. EMI plans must be presented to the customer before order confirmation.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can select credit card EMI at checkout
Available EMI tenures and interest rates are displayed before order placement

requirements.description: The system must support no-cost EMI through third-party financing partners, with confirmed integration with Bajaj Finance. ZestMoney integration is pending partner agreement.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can select Bajaj Finance no-cost EMI at checkout
Bajaj Finance API is integrated and returns valid EMI offers
ZestMoney integration is scoped but may be deferred pending agreement

requirements.description: RetailCorp has an existing signed agreement with Bajaj Finance for no-cost EMI. ZestMoney agreement is not yet finalized and may not be available at launch.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: The system must support four distinct user roles: end customers, store managers, central admins, and vendor partners. Each role must have a separate login and role-specific access.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Customer login provides access to browse, purchase, wishlist, and order tracking
Store manager login provides access to regional orders and returns management
Central admin login provides access to products, pricing, and promotions
Vendor login provides access to inventory and product information management only

requirements.description: Store managers must be able to view orders from their assigned region and manage returns. Access must be restricted to their regional scope.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Store manager can view all orders placed within their region
Store manager can initiate or approve return requests for regional orders
Store manager cannot view orders outside their assigned region

requirements.description: Central admin users must be able to manage products, pricing, and promotions across the entire platform. This role has full catalog and commercial control.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Central admin can create, edit, and deactivate products
Central admin can set and update product prices
Central admin can create and manage promotional campaigns

requirements.description: Vendor partners must have a dedicated login to manage their product listings and inventory. Vendors must not have access to pricing controls.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can log in and update product information for their listings
Vendor can update inventory quantities for their products
Vendor cannot view or modify product pricing

requirements.description: All product pricing is controlled exclusively by RetailCorp central admin. Vendors are not permitted to set or modify prices for their listed products.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor portal does not expose any pricing fields
Any attempt by vendor to modify price via API is rejected with an authorization error

requirements.description: The platform will support a multi-vendor marketplace model where third-party vendors list products alongside RetailCorp's own inventory. Vendor onboarding scope is included in the project.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: The initial product catalog contains approximately 8,000 SKUs, expected to grow to 25,000 SKUs once vendor products are onboarded. Catalog design must accommodate this scale.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: The system must integrate with the client's existing SAP ERP to migrate and sync product data and inventory. This integration is required for catalog population and ongoing operations.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Product data is successfully migrated from SAP ERP to the e-commerce platform
Inventory levels are synchronized between SAP and the platform
Integration handles at least 25,000 SKUs without data loss

requirements.description: Inventory levels must be synchronized with SAP ERP in real time to prevent overselling. A product must reflect its current stock status immediately upon any change.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Inventory update in SAP is reflected on the platform within an acceptable real-time threshold (e.g., under 60 seconds)
A product sold out in-store is marked unavailable on the platform without manual intervention

requirements.description: Product information (non-inventory attributes) must be synced from SAP ERP via a daily batch process. Real-time sync is not required for product metadata.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: A scheduled batch job runs once per day to pull updated product information from SAP
Product attributes on the platform reflect SAP data as of the last batch run

requirements.description: The platform must provide a robust search capability allowing customers to search by product name, category, and brand. Search must return relevant results quickly.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Customer can search by product name and receive relevant results
Customer can search by category and brand
Search results are returned within acceptable response time

requirements.description: The platform must support product filtering by price range, brand, customer ratings, and estimated delivery time. Filters must be combinable.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Customer can filter search results by price range
Customer can filter by brand, ratings, and delivery time
Multiple filters can be applied simultaneously and results update accordingly

requirements.description: Customers must be able to submit product reviews and ratings. All reviews must go through a moderation workflow before being published on the platform.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can submit a review and star rating for a purchased product
Submitted review is placed in a pending moderation queue
Review is only visible to other customers after admin approval
Admin can approve or reject reviews from the moderation queue

requirements.description: Customers must be able to add products to a wishlist for future reference. The wishlist must persist across sessions.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Customer can add any product to their wishlist
Wishlist items are retained when the customer logs out and back in
Customer can remove items from the wishlist

requirements.description: The system must integrate with Delhivery and BlueDart logistics APIs to retrieve real-time shipping rates and provide order tracking. Both carriers must be supported at launch.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Shipping rates from Delhivery and BlueDart are displayed to the customer at checkout
Order tracking information from both carriers is accessible from the platform
API integration with both Delhivery and BlueDart is functional in production

requirements.description: Customers must be able to track their order status in real time directly within the platform. Tracking must not require the customer to visit a third-party logistics website.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can view current order status and shipment location from their account on the platform
Tracking information is updated in real time from the logistics provider API

requirements.description: The platform must comply with GDPR regulations to support NRI customers. Applicable data subject rights and consent mechanisms must be implemented.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform provides cookie consent and privacy notice compliant with GDPR
Customers can request data access, correction, or deletion
Data processing activities are documented in a GDPR-compliant manner

requirements.description: The platform must comply with the Indian Information Technology Act. Applicable provisions for data protection and electronic commerce must be adhered to.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform implements required disclosures and policies per the IT Act
Legal and compliance review confirms IT Act adherence before go-live

requirements.description: All customer data must be stored exclusively on servers located within India. No customer data may be stored or processed on infrastructure outside Indian borders.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: All production databases and storage services are hosted in Indian data centers
No customer PII is transmitted to or stored in servers outside India
Data residency is verified and documented prior to launch

requirements.description: The platform must handle a minimum of 50,000 concurrent users during peak sale events such as Diwali. The system must remain stable and functional under this load.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Load testing confirms the platform sustains 50,000 concurrent users without downtime
Error rate remains below an acceptable threshold under peak load
No critical functionality degrades under peak traffic conditions

requirements.description: All customer-facing pages must load within 3 seconds under normal operating conditions. This applies to product listing, product detail, and checkout pages.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Page load time for product listing, product detail, and checkout pages is under 3 seconds on standard broadband
Performance is validated via load testing and real-user monitoring

requirements.description: The platform must provide sales reports with daily, weekly, and monthly views. Reports must be filterable by region, product category, and vendor.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can generate a sales report for a selected daily, weekly, or monthly period
Reports can be filtered by region, category, and vendor
Report data is accurate and consistent with order records

requirements.description: The platform must track and report cart abandonment analytics, identifying products that customers view or add to cart but do not purchase.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view a report of products frequently abandoned in cart
Cart abandonment rate is calculated and displayed per product or category
Data is available for configurable time periods

requirements.description: The platform must support sending promotional emails and SMS to customers. This may be achieved via a built-in marketing tool or integration with a third-party marketing platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create and send promotional email campaigns to customer segments
Admin can send promotional SMS messages to customers
Customers can opt out of marketing communications in compliance with regulations

requirements.description: The platform must integrate with SAP ERP for product and inventory data. The existing SAP system is a hard technology constraint that cannot be replaced.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: RetailCorp has existing API agreements or technical access with Delhivery and BlueDart logistics providers. The delivery team assumes these APIs are accessible for integration.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: The 50,000 peak user figure is derived from physical store footfall data and is used as a proxy for expected online peak traffic. Actual online traffic patterns may differ.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: The platform must be scalable to support catalog growth from 8,000 to at least 25,000 SKUs without architectural changes or performance degradation.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Platform catalog supports at least 25,000 active SKUs
Search and browse performance meets the 3-second page load requirement at 25,000 SKUs

requirements.description: Customer reviews must not be published on the platform without prior moderation and approval by an authorized admin. Unmoderated reviews must never be visible to other customers.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: No review is visible on a product page until it has been explicitly approved by an admin
Rejected reviews are not published and the submitting customer may be notified

requirements.description: The system shall allow new customers to register using an email address or mobile number so that their details are saved and orders can be tracked.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can register using a valid email address
Customer can register using a valid mobile number
Duplicate email or mobile number registration is rejected with an appropriate error message
Upon successful registration, customer profile is created and persisted
Customer receives a confirmation notification (email or SMS) after registration

requirements.description: The system shall allow registered customers to log in using email and password or OTP so that they can access their account and purchase history.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can log in with a valid email and password combination
Customer can log in using an OTP sent to their registered mobile number or email
Invalid credentials result in a clear error message without revealing which field is incorrect
OTP expires after a defined time window (e.g., 5 minutes)
Successful login redirects customer to their account dashboard with purchase history accessible

requirements.description: The authentication system shall enforce security controls including account lockout after repeated failed login attempts and encrypted credential transmission so that customer accounts are protected from unauthorized access.
acceptance_criteria: Account is locked after 5 consecutive failed login attempts
All credentials are transmitted over HTTPS/TLS
Passwords are stored using a strong hashing algorithm (e.g., bcrypt)
OTP is single-use and invalidated after successful authentication

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to search for products by name, brand, or category so that they can quickly locate desired items.
acceptance_criteria: Search bar is accessible from all pages of the platform
Search returns relevant results when queried by product name
Search returns relevant results when queried by brand name
Search returns relevant results when queried by category
Search results are displayed within an acceptable response time
A no-results message is shown when no matching products are found

requirements.description: The search system shall return results within 2 seconds for 95% of queries under normal load so that customers experience a responsive and performant search.
acceptance_criteria: Search response time is under 2 seconds for 95% of requests under normal load
Search remains functional under concurrent user load without degradation

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to filter search results by price, brand, rating, and delivery time so that they can narrow down products to those that meet their needs.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can filter results by a price range (min and max)
Customer can filter results by one or more brands
Customer can filter results by minimum customer rating
Customer can filter results by estimated delivery time
Multiple filters can be applied simultaneously
Applied filters are visually indicated and can be individually removed
Filtered results update dynamically without requiring a full page reload

requirements.description: The system shall display detailed product information on a dedicated product page so that customers can make informed purchase decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Product page displays product name, description, images, price, and brand
Product page displays current stock availability
Product page displays customer ratings and reviews
Product page displays estimated delivery time
Multiple product images can be viewed including zoom functionality
Product specifications and key features are listed

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to add one or more products to a shopping cart so that they can purchase multiple items in a single transaction.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can add a product to the cart from the product detail page or search results
Cart displays all added products with quantity, unit price, and subtotal
Customer can update the quantity of items in the cart
Customer can remove items from the cart
Cart total is recalculated automatically when items are added, removed, or quantities changed
Cart contents persist across sessions for logged-in customers

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to save products to a wishlist so that they can return and purchase those items at a later time.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can add a product to their wishlist from the product detail page or search results
Wishlist is accessible from the customer's account dashboard
Customer can remove products from the wishlist
Customer can move a product directly from the wishlist to the cart
Wishlist persists across sessions for logged-in customers

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to add, manage, and select a delivery address during checkout so that orders are dispatched to the correct location.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can add a new delivery address during checkout
Customer can select from previously saved addresses
Customer can edit or delete saved addresses
Selected delivery address is clearly displayed on the order summary before payment
Address fields include name, street, city, state, PIN code, and phone number
PIN code validation is performed to confirm serviceability

requirements.description: The system shall support payment via credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking, and EMI so that customers can choose their preferred payment method at checkout.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can pay using credit card
Customer can pay using debit card
Customer can pay using UPI
Customer can pay using net banking
Customer can pay using EMI with available tenure options displayed
Payment confirmation is shown immediately upon successful transaction
Failed payment results in a clear error message with retry option
Order is not confirmed until payment is successfully processed

requirements.description: The payment system shall comply with PCI-DSS standards and encrypt all payment data in transit and at rest so that customer financial information is protected.
acceptance_criteria: Payment processing complies with PCI-DSS Level 1 requirements
All payment data is transmitted over TLS 1.2 or higher
No raw card data is stored on platform servers
Payment gateway integration uses tokenization for card details

requirements.description: The system shall provide customers with real-time order tracking so that they can monitor the current status and estimated arrival time of their delivery.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can view the current status of their order (e.g., confirmed, packed, shipped, out for delivery, delivered)
Tracking page displays estimated delivery date and time
Order status updates are reflected in real time or near real time
Customer receives push or SMS notification on key status changes
Tracking information is accessible from the order history page

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers who have purchased a product to submit a written review and star rating so that their experience is shared with other customers.
acceptance_criteria: Only customers with a confirmed delivered order for the product can submit a review
Review form includes a star rating (1–5) and a text field for written feedback
Customer can submit only one review per purchased product
Submitted review is held for admin approval before being published
Customer is notified when their review is approved or rejected

requirements.description: The system shall provide central admins with a review moderation interface to approve or reject customer-submitted reviews so that only appropriate content is published on the platform.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view a queue of all pending reviews
Admin can approve a review, making it publicly visible on the product page
Admin can reject a review with an optional reason
Approved and rejected reviews are logged with admin ID and timestamp
Customer is notified of the moderation outcome

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to add, edit, and deactivate products in the catalog so that the platform always displays accurate and current product information.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create a new product with all required fields (name, description, images, category, brand, price)
Admin can edit any field of an existing product
Admin can deactivate a product, making it invisible to customers without deleting it
Deactivated products are not returned in customer search results or browsing
All catalog changes are logged with admin ID and timestamp
Changes are reflected on the platform within a defined time window (e.g., within 5 minutes)

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to set and update product prices and discounts so that customers always see correct and current pricing.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can set the base price for any product
Admin can apply a percentage or fixed-amount discount to a product
Admin can set a validity period for discounts (start and end date/time)
Discounted price and original price are both displayed to customers
Expired discounts revert automatically to the base price
Price changes are reflected on the platform in real time or near real time

requirements.description: The system shall synchronize inventory levels with SAP in real time so that customers are never shown out-of-stock products as available for purchase.
acceptance_criteria: Inventory levels on the platform are updated within 60 seconds of a change in SAP
Products with zero inventory are automatically marked as out of stock and cannot be added to cart
Inventory sync failures are logged and trigger an alert to the operations team
A reconciliation mechanism exists to detect and resolve sync discrepancies

requirements.description: The SAP inventory synchronization shall achieve a maximum latency of 60 seconds and maintain 99.9% sync reliability so that inventory data on the platform remains accurate.
acceptance_criteria: Inventory sync latency does not exceed 60 seconds under normal operating conditions
Sync success rate is 99.9% or higher measured over a rolling 30-day period
Failed sync events are retried automatically with exponential backoff

requirements.description: The system shall provide vendors with a self-service interface to manage their product listings so that their products are accurately represented on the platform.
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can log in to a dedicated vendor portal
Vendor can add new product listings with required attributes
Vendor can edit existing product details including description, images, and specifications
Vendor can activate or deactivate their own product listings
Vendor changes are subject to admin review before going live, or published within a defined SLA
Vendor can only manage their own product listings and cannot access other vendors' data

requirements.description: The system shall provide store managers with a regional order management view so that they can coordinate local deliveries and returns effectively.
acceptance_criteria: Store manager can view all orders associated with their assigned region
Order list displays order ID, customer name, status, items, and delivery address
Store manager can filter orders by status (e.g., pending, dispatched, delivered, return requested)
Store manager cannot view orders outside their assigned region
Order data is refreshed in real time or near real time

requirements.description: The system shall provide central admins with sales reports filterable by day, week, month, category, region, and vendor so that informed business decisions can be made.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can generate sales reports filtered by daily, weekly, and monthly time periods
Admin can filter reports by product category
Admin can filter reports by geographic region
Admin can filter reports by vendor
Reports display total revenue, number of orders, and units sold
Reports can be exported in CSV or PDF format

requirements.description: The system shall provide central admins with a cart abandonment report showing products added to cart but not purchased so that conversion issues can be identified and addressed.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view a list of products most frequently abandoned in cart without purchase
Report shows abandonment count and abandonment rate per product
Report can be filtered by time period (e.g., last 7 days, 30 days)
Data is updated at least daily
Report can be exported in CSV format

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admins to create and send promotional campaigns to customers via email and SMS so that traffic and sales can be driven during promotional events.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create a campaign with a subject, message body, and target audience segment
Admin can schedule a campaign for immediate or future delivery
Campaign can be sent via email, SMS, or both
Customers who have opted out of marketing communications are excluded automatically
Admin can view campaign delivery and open/click rate metrics after sending

requirements.description: The marketing campaign system shall comply with applicable communication regulations (e.g., TRAI DND registry for SMS) so that customers' opt-out preferences are respected and regulatory penalties are avoided.
acceptance_criteria: SMS campaigns are scrubbed against the TRAI DND registry before dispatch
Email campaigns include a functional unsubscribe link
Opt-out preferences are honoured within 24 hours of customer request

requirements.description: The system shall provide a fully functional mobile application for Android and iOS so that customers can browse and purchase products conveniently from their mobile devices.
acceptance_criteria: Application is available on Google Play Store for Android devices
Application is available on Apple App Store for iOS devices
All core customer-facing features (search, browse, cart, checkout, order tracking) are available on mobile
Application is responsive and usable on screen sizes from 4 inches and above
Application supports the latest two major versions of Android and iOS

requirements.description: The mobile application shall load the home screen within 3 seconds on a standard 4G connection so that customers experience acceptable performance on mobile devices.
acceptance_criteria: Home screen loads within 3 seconds on a standard 4G connection
Application does not crash under normal usage conditions
Application size does not exceed 50 MB for initial download

requirements.description: The system shall provide executives with a mobile-accessible dashboard displaying key business metrics so that they can stay informed without requiring access to a desktop.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard is accessible via the mobile application with role-based access for executives
Dashboard displays key metrics including total revenue, number of orders, and top-selling products
Metrics can be viewed for configurable time periods (e.g., today, this week, this month)
Dashboard data is refreshed at least every 15 minutes
Dashboard is readable and navigable on mobile screen sizes

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to initiate a return request for a delivered product so that they can receive a refund if the product is defective or not as described.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can initiate a return from the order history page within the eligible return window
Customer must select a reason for the return (e.g., defective, wrong item, not as described)
Customer can upload supporting images when submitting a return request
System confirms receipt of the return request and provides a return reference number
Customer is notified of the return status at each stage (approved, pickup scheduled, refund processed)
Refund is processed to the original payment method upon successful return verification

requirements.description: The system shall integrate with Delhivery and BlueDart APIs so that shipping rates are calculated automatically and real-time order tracking is available.
acceptance_criteria: System retrieves shipping rate quotes from Delhivery and BlueDart APIs at checkout based on delivery PIN code and order weight
Calculated shipping rates are displayed to the customer before order confirmation
Tracking information from Delhivery and BlueDart is pulled and displayed on the order tracking page
API integration failures are handled gracefully with fallback messaging to the customer
Integration supports both forward (delivery) and reverse (return pickup) logistics workflows

requirements.description: The logistics API integration shall handle provider outages gracefully with a timeout and retry mechanism so that a single carrier API failure does not disrupt the checkout or tracking experience.
acceptance_criteria: API calls to logistics providers time out after a maximum of 5 seconds
Failed API calls are retried up to 3 times before surfacing an error
System remains operational for checkout if one carrier API is unavailable, using the available carrier

glossary.ShopEase: The e-commerce platform being built for RetailCorp India Pvt. Ltd. to enable online retail of home appliances, electronics, and furniture
glossary.RetailCorp India: The client organisation, a mid-size retail chain operating approximately 200 physical stores across India, entering the online retail space
glossary.Central Admin: A user role with full platform-wide access to manage products, pricing, promotions, reports, and moderation on behalf of RetailCorp
glossary.Store Manager: A user role restricted to viewing orders and managing returns within their assigned geographic region
glossary.Vendor Partner: A third-party seller who lists products on the ShopEase marketplace via a self-service portal, without access to pricing controls
glossary.No-Cost EMI: An equated monthly instalment option where the customer pays no interest, funded through third-party financing partners such as Bajaj Finance or ZestMoney
glossary.SAP ERP: RetailCorp's existing enterprise resource planning system used as the master source for product data and inventory levels, integrated with ShopEase
glossary.SKU: Stock Keeping Unit — a unique identifier for each distinct product variant in the catalog; initial catalog is approximately 8,000 SKUs growing to 25,000
glossary.Bajaj Finance: A confirmed third-party financing partner providing no-cost EMI services, with a signed agreement in place with RetailCorp
glossary.ZestMoney: A prospective third-party financing partner for no-cost EMI whose agreement with RetailCorp is not yet finalised at the time of requirements capture
glossary.Delhivery: A logistics provider integrated via API to supply real-time shipping rates and order tracking, assumed to have existing API access
glossary.BlueDart: A second logistics provider integrated via API alongside Delhivery for shipping rate calculation and real-time order tracking
glossary.PCI-DSS: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard — the compliance framework governing secure handling of payment card data on the platform
glossary.TRAI DND Registry: Telecom Regulatory Authority of India Do Not Disturb registry — a regulatory list the platform must check before sending promotional SMS messages
glossary.Review Moderation Workflow: The internal process by which an authorised admin must approve or reject a customer-submitted product review before it is published publicly
glossary.Peak Sale Event: A high-traffic commercial period such as Diwali during which the platform must sustain a minimum of 50,000 concurrent users
glossary.Multi-Vendor Marketplace: The platform model in which third-party vendors list and sell products alongside RetailCorp's own inventory under centralised pricing control
glossary.Cart Abandonment: The event where a customer adds one or more products to the shopping cart but does not complete the purchase, tracked for analytics and re-engagement
